nameZh: NYC 连锁餐厅热量标识规则
actionZh: 对在 NYC 运营且全国连锁 15 家以上的门店，菜单/菜单板/线上点餐需标注热量。
actionEn: Chains with 15+ locations nationally operating in NYC must post calorie counts on menus, menu boards and online ordering.

nameZh: NYC 添加糖警示规则 (Sweet Truth Act)
actionZh: 全国连锁 15 家以上、在 NYC 经营的连锁餐厅须对高添加糖菜单项标注警示图标。
actionEn: Chain restaurants (15+ locations nationally) in NYC must display a warning icon on menu items high in added sugars.

actionZh: 全国连锁 15 家以上、在 NYC 经营的门店须对高钠菜单项标注盐瓶警示图标。
actionEn: Chains with 15+ locations nationally in NYC must display the salt-shaker warning icon on high-sodium menu items.

nameZh: FDA 联邦菜单标识最终规则
nameEn: FDA Federal Menu Labeling Final Rule
actionZh: 拥有 20 家以上同名连锁门店、提供相同菜单的，须遵守 FDA 联邦菜单热量标识要求。
actionEn: Restaurants that are part of a chain of 20+ locations with the same name and menu must comply with FDA federal menu calorie labeling.

nameZh: NYC 公平工作周法 (快餐)
actionZh: 若被认定为全国 30 家以上的快餐连锁，则适用排班预告、可预测性补偿、调岗优先权等要求；按门店口径需法务确认（在岗 18 / 在岗+筹建 25 / 全状态 30）。
actionEn: If classified as a fast-food chain with 30+ locations nationally, advance-schedule, predictability-pay and access-to-hours rules apply; counting basis needs legal review (open 18 / open+planned 25 / all-status 30).

nameZh: NYC 带薪安全与病假法
nameEn: NYC Earned Safe and Sick Time Act
actionZh: 任何在 NYC 有员工的雇主均须提供带薪安全与病假；员工 ≥ 5 人或净收入门槛触发带薪累积。
actionEn: Any employer with employees in NYC must provide safe/sick leave; paid accrual applies at 5+ employees or the net-income threshold.

nameZh: NYC 商业有机垃圾分类 (连锁)
actionZh: 连锁餐饮在同一城市 2 处以上、合计 8,000 平方英尺以上的，须源头分离有机垃圾、使用持牌运输商。
actionEn: Chain food service with 2+ locations in the city totaling 8,000+ sq ft must source-separate organics and use a licensed hauler.

nameZh: NYC 商业有机垃圾分类 (单店)
actionZh: 单一餐饮场所 7,000 平方英尺以上（或同栋建筑合计 8,000 以上）须分离有机垃圾。
actionEn: A single food-service establishment of 7,000+ sq ft (or 8,000+ combined in one building) must separate organics.

nameZh: NYC DEP 油脂 (FOG) 最佳管理规范
nameEn: NYC DEP Fats, Oils & Grease (FOG) BMP
actionZh: 所有餐饮场所均须安装隔油设备；具体规模门槛待核实（2021-09-25 起禁止食物垃圾液化器排入下水道）。
actionEn: All food-service establishments must install grease interceptors; size cutoffs to verify (food-waste-liquefier sewer discharge banned from 2021-09-25).

nameZh: NYC 快餐“正当理由”解雇保护
actionZh: 若被认定为全国 30 家以上的快餐连锁，则 30 天试用期后不得无“正当理由”或正当经济原因解雇/削减 15% 以上工时；需建立渐进式纪律与记录。
actionEn: If classified as a fast-food chain of 30+ nationally, after a 30-day probation employees may not be discharged or have hours cut 15%+ without just cause or a bona fide economic reason; requires progressive discipline + documentation.

actionZh: 在 75 英里范围内雇用 50 名以上员工时适用：为符合条件的员工提供最长 12 周无薪、保留职位的家庭/医疗假。30 家 NYC 门店几乎必然触发。
actionEn: Applies at 50+ employees within 75 miles: up to 12 weeks of unpaid, job-protected family/medical leave for eligible employees. 30 NYC stores almost certainly trips this.

nameEn: Title VII of the Civil Rights Act
actionZh: 雇用 15 名以上员工时适用：禁止基于种族、肤色、宗教、性别、原国籍的就业歧视；ADA 第一章与 PWFA 同为 15 人门槛。
actionEn: Applies at 15+ employees: bans employment discrimination by race, color, religion, sex, national origin (ADA Title I and PWFA share the 15-employee gate).

actionZh: 雇用 20 名以上员工时适用：禁止对 40 岁及以上员工的年龄歧视。
actionEn: Applies at 20+ employees: prohibits age discrimination against workers 40 and older.

actionZh: 雇用 15 名以上员工时适用：为怀孕、分娩及相关情况提供合理便利（休息、座位、排班调整等）。
actionEn: Applies at 15+ employees: reasonable accommodation for pregnancy, childbirth and related conditions (breaks, seating, schedule adjustments).

actionZh: 雇用 4 名以上员工时适用：所有招聘/晋升/调岗广告须披露最低-最高薪资范围（NYC LL32 同为 4 人门槛）。
actionEn: Applies at 4+ employees: all job/promotion/transfer ads must disclose a min-max pay range (NYC LL32 shares the 4-employee gate).

nameZh: NYC 公平机会法 (禁问犯罪记录)
actionZh: 雇用 4 名以上员工时适用：在发出有条件录用前不得询问犯罪历史；须执行“公平机会程序”。
actionEn: Applies at 4+ employees: no criminal-history inquiry before a conditional offer; the Fair Chance Process is required.

actionZh: 雇用 4 名以上员工时适用：须提供哺乳室与书面政策，并在门店张贴（含电子张贴）。
actionEn: Applies at 4+ employees: must provide a lactation room + written policy and post it at each store (physically and electronically).
